heading: Transfers of stock; rules and regulations
label: 286 Transfers of stock; rules and regulations
text: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System is empowered to adopt and promulgate rules and regulations governing the transfers of said stock.
notes: CodificationSection is based on the twelfth par. of section 2 of act . For classification of other pars. of section 2 of this Act, see Codification note set out under .Dec. 23, 1913section 222 of this title
Change of NameSection 203(a) of act , changed name of Federal Reserve Board to Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.Aug. 23, 1935
